titleStmt.title: SII 8.754: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 754. (A.R. No. 438 of 1903). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṭa maṇṭali maṉṉuyirtoṟum Iṉṉaruḷ curantu Iṟainiḻaṟ parappi niṟpa muṟaimaiyil ceṅkol ticaitoṟuṉ ticaitoṟuṉ taṅkaḷ kulamutal paṟutiyili kkoṟṟai yāḻi kulāva naṟṟavat tirumalarc celviyum Irunilappāvaiyuṅ kirtta yu
viyarāka maṇimuṭi cūṭṭi neṭunilamaṉṉavar muṟaimuṟai taṉṉaṭi vaṇaṅka vīramu n=ti yākamum Āra(m)meṉa puṇarn tu māpp(o)ṟu pukaḻ maṉuvuṭan vaḷartta kopparakecaripanma rāna Uṭaiyār śrī Ātirājentrade vaṟku yāṇṭu 3Āvatu rājentra coḻavaḷanāṭṭu paṉaiyūrnāṭṭu
ḷūr pratiṣṭhi tta śivadharmma maṭam śivabhaktarā layattu Apūrvi- kaḷ vantuṇṇum ma hānkaḷukku Ā hārārttha mākavum Atukku veṇṭum niva- n=ta ṅkaḷukkum Idharmma m śivārttha māka Addharmma ttukku koṇṭār rājarāja n jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻanāṉa se nāpa tikaḷ Irukkuveḷārkku
pañcavanmātevivatikku kiḻakku tiruveṇkāṭavāykkālukku teṟku Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catiram Iraṇṭumāviṟ tenmeṟkaṭaiya nilan māvaraikkāṇi muntirikai nikki nilan Araiye mukkāṇi muntirikaiyun Iṅke muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāiraṇṭāñ catirattu
vatikku kiḻakku śrī vāsu teva vāykkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu teṟkaṭaiya nirnilan Iraṇṭu varaikkāṇiyum Ivvatikku kiḻakku Ivvāykkālukku teṟku munṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñcatirattu men
nirnilan muntirikaiyum meṟkaṭainta muṉṟumāvil vaṭakiḻakku nilan mukkāṇiyum Āka rā ccaturvve timaṅkalattu paṭṭi nilan I ttumāvi ṟum Immaṭame citta mulai maṅkalavītiyil rājentra coḻaviṇṇakarāḻvār koyi
ttukku vaṭakkum naṭuvupaṭṭa maṉaikkol Onṟināl maṉai muṟṟum viṟṟu Eṅkaḷil Icaintu koḷvatāka vilaittiravviyam Anṟāṭu naṟkācu nāṟpatum Innilattukku nāṅkaḷ Iṟai Iṟukkakkaṭavomāka koṇṭa Iṟaittiravviyaṅ vilaittiravviyamum ta
m Āvaṇakkaḷiye kiḻikaic celakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom Ūrkiḻān rājarāja n jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻanāna se- nāpatikaḷ Irukkuveḷārkku paravaipurattu nakarattom . Innilattukku nirk kiyntavaṇṇam nirpāccikkoḷḷap peṟuvatākavum .
cca peṟātomākavum . cantirātittavaṟ koḷḷap peṟuvatākavum . Innilattāl vanta Iṟai Iṟuttukkuṭuttu Innilam Uḻuvāraiyum Āṟṟukkāl veṭṭi muṭṭaiyāḷ cilliṟai ceṉ Uḷḷiṭṭu Eppeṟpaṭṭitum kāṭṭakkaṭavo mallātomākavum . Inta tanma nokkivanta veṟṟa
ntu koḷḷakkaṭava vilaittiravviyamum Iṟaittiravviyamum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kiḻi kaiccelak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom se ṉāpatikaḷ Irukkuveḷārkku paravaippurattu nakarattom . Ivarkaḷ colla Ippiramāṇam Eḻutinen
ṇatevanāna paravaipuramaṅkalottamanen . Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu . śrī panmā- heśvara ra kṣai .
Digital edition of SII 8.754 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
